name: Eshu
description:
"Keep your judgment for someone else."

Eshu takes a keen eye to you. He got the thing with Lara and Sam, but with you, you didn't seem to be with the two women for the sake of treasure hunting.

Takes place before discovering Eshu is an Orisha. So before the motel scene.

______________________________

I actually really like season two of this show. I love learning anything about African Mythology, i thought that it was mkre entertaining to witness than the first. Not sure why. But I basically love every new character from season two, though i wish that Mila was a little more explained. Moreso how she met the first Orisha and why she has these radicalized views. The big bad of the first season was more consistant and had a backstory, while Mila feels a bit stereotypical bad guy with no real explanation why she feels this way.

Cool show though, can't believe it got canceled.

No, i never played the games, i played uncharted as a young girl. Odd, i know. Another odd thing i found out, while trying to search up Zip to remember his name, he turns out to be from the game and not nor as flamboyant as he was in the show. Which dissapoints me because they felt the need to change him if he was already from the game as is, wish they made a new character but with the same struggles.
creator: LemonadeGirl
